Why Most AI Projects Fail After the Demo Actually Works

Building an AI demo is easy. Shipping an AI system that runs reliably in production, day after day, under load, within budget, and with observability, is hard.

- Shift AI from demo to production: Learn architectural patterns for reliable, scalable, and cost-effective AI systems using RAG and FastAPI.
- The Gap: Many teams discover this gap only after their impressive proof-of-concept collapses when exposed to real users, real data, and real operational constraints.
